title: `Reader` holds raw `hid_t` without HDF5 refcount increment
author: devdanzin

comments.author: neutrinoceros
comments.body:
> HDF5 refcount

does HDF5 have its own refcount system ? (it's entirely possible I'm just not aware of it, I never claimed to be an HDF5 expert)

comments.author: devdanzin
comments.body:
Yes, using e.g. `H5Iinc_ref`. It seems not to be used a lot in h5py but here's an example (last line):

https://github.com/h5py/h5py/blob/6dd4531f1d1ac8de5b208ae744c260d5fa1fc025/h5py/h5f.templ.pyx#L281-L292
